'''Brooks''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] technician that worked for [[Senate Support Services]]. He was sent by the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Office of the Supreme Chancellor]] to work on ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' prior to its departure from [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. He was a friend of [[Dean Jinzler]] and brought Jinzler's [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] sister, [[Lorana Jinzler]], to meet him in the mess hall on ''Outbound Flight''. He had recently repaired a defective line network and then addressed Jinzler to a possible connection to Dean. When the Jedi said that she did not know [[Jinzler family|her relatives]], he called Dean to him and introduced Dean to Lorana. After Dean then revealed that he was Lorana's brother, Brooks withdrew from the conversation, shocked by Dean's reveal.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
